original_image_tags: A line-drawn map depicting a geographical area with a coastline (likely a cape or peninsula) and various roads and facilities. The map is overlaid with contour lines labeled "10^-6", "10^-5", and "10^-4", indicating risk levels for inner-ear injury. The contour lines originate from a central point within the facility complex. There are numerous small structures and facility icons depicted on the map.

elements.description: A line-drawn map titled 'Atlas IIAS Inner Ear Injury Mode-5 A = 3.5' displaying three labeled risk contour lines (10^-6, 10^-5, 10^-4) over a complex schematic of structures, roads, and various symbols. The caption below reads 'Figure 3. Atlas IIAS Risk Contours for Inner-Ear Injury with A = 3.5'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements (a line-drawn map with three contour lines labeled 10^-6, 10^-5, 10^-4 over structures and roads), but Description B adds the specific title and caption text that A omits, without any contradiction.
